title: June 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 30''' is the 181st day of the year (182nd in leap years), with 184 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1966|1956]] – [[David Alan Grier]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Marton Csokas]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Brian Bloom]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Star Wars Insider 38|''Star Wars Insider'' 38]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars Insider 44|''Star Wars Insider'' 44]] published.
*[[2003]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']] starts.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 66|''Republic'' 66]] published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]] published.
*2004 – [[Empire 21|''Empire'' 21]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Dark Times 17|''Dark Times'' 17]] published.
*2010 – [[Invasion: Rescues 2|''Invasion: Rescues'' 2]] published.
*2010 – [[Legacy (2006) 49|''Legacy'' (2006) 49]] published.
*2010 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 9: Monster]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic UK 6.22]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Comic 7.7|''Star Wars'' Comic 7]] published.
*2014 – ''[[Ultimate Factivity Collection: Star Wars]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Jedi Academy: The Phantom Bully]]'' published.
*2015 – [[Tarkin (novel)|''Tarkin'']] published in paperback.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion (HC)|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' hardcover]] published.
*2020 – ''[[Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire]]'' published in paperback.
*2020 – "[[Black Spire: Return to a Shattered Planet]]" published in the paperback edition of ''Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire''.
*[[2021]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 11|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 11]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic (2021) 6|''The High Republic'' (2021) 6]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of a Jedi 2|''Star Wars Adventures: The Weapon of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Kenneth Colley]] dies.
*[[2026]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars: Andor]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The High Republic: Survivors of the Stormwall]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
